---
title: "London Plane (Platanus × hispanica)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Platanaceae](/trees/family/platanaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Platanus*](/trees/genus/platanus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 1 - London Plane](../1.html) | SK: Evolution Garden |
| [Tree 160 — London plane](../160.html) |  |
| [Tree 162 — London plane](../162.html) |  |
| [Tree 165 — London plane](../165.html) |  |
| [Tree 168 — London plane](../168.html) |  |
| [Tree 172 — London plane](../172.html) |  |
| [Tree 181 — London plane](../181.html) |  |
| [Tree 184 — London plane](../184.html) |  |
| [Tree 188 — London plane](../188.html) |  |
| [Tree 189 — London plane](../189.html) |  |
| [Tree 190 — London plane](../190.html) |  |
| [Tree 192 — London plane](../192.html) |  |
| [Tree 196 — London plane](../196.html) |  |
| [Tree 337 — London plane](../337.html) |  |
| [Tree 338 — London plane](../338.html) |  |
| [Tree 342 — London plane](../342.html) |  |
| [Tree TBC — London plane](../TBC.html) |  |
